creator: christoph.mallon@gmx.de
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of games/jaggedalliance2,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/114515 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114515
> 
I do not agree with the patch. Adding RUSSIAN as option is pointless, 
because only garbage will be displayed as text (the character to glyph 
mapping is plain wrong). The POLISH option suffers from the same 
problem, but adding this was my fault.
Further in pkg-message a short notice should be added, that a config 
file is created in the user's home directory (~/.ja2/ja2.ini) and the 
path to the data files has to be added there manually.

On a related not, I am working on the next release, which will hopefully 
have working Polish and Russian support.
